goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre' and should be in the type of 'mutliple sports'.
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in 'the type of architecture'.
Make sure you get 'entrance fee', 'phone number', and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'tuesday' and should go to 'london liverpool street'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 12:15'.
Make sure you get 'arrival time'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre and should be in the type of mutliple sports
If there is no such attraction, how about one that is in the type of architecture
Make sure you get entrance fee, phone number, and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on tuesday and should go to london liverpool street
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 12:15
Make sure you get arrival time
